args.query: SELECT Id FROM Opportunity WHERE REPLACE(ContactId, '#', '') = REPLACE('003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR', '#', '') AND CloseDate >= '2021-06-01' AND CloseDate < '2021-07-15' ORDER BY CloseDate DESC LIMIT 10;

exec_args.sql: SELECT Id FROM Opportunity WHERE REPLACE(ContactId, '#', '') = REPLACE('003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR', '#', '') AND CloseDate >= '2021-06-01' AND CloseDate < '2021-07-15' ORDER BY CloseDate DESC LIMIT 10;

args.query: SELECT oli.Product2Id FROM OpportunityLineItem oli JOIN Opportunity o ON o.Id = oli.OpportunityId WHERE o.Id = '006Wt000007B0g2IAC' OR o.Id = '006Wt000007B7TcIAK';

exec_args.sql: SELECT oli.Product2Id FROM OpportunityLineItem oli JOIN Opportunity o ON o.Id = oli.OpportunityId WHERE o.Id = '006Wt000007B0g2IAC' OR o.Id = '006Wt000007B7TcIAK';

args.query: SELECT Id FROM Product2 WHERE LOWER(TRIM(Name)) LIKE '%ai processing unit%';

exec_args.sql: SELECT Id FROM Product2 WHERE LOWER(TRIM(Name)) LIKE '%ai processing unit%';

args.query: SELECT Id, Name FROM Product2 WHERE REPLACE(Id, '#','') IN (REPLACE('#01tWt000006hV8LIAU','#',''), REPLACE('01tWt000006hTUkIAM','#',''), REPLACE('01tWt000006hV9xIAE','#',''));
